name: Instant Brainwashing Magic+
description:
A fantasy mind control sandbox featuring 600+ characters including from Nicchi Sangyou's works, and series' like Senran Kagura, ID@LMASTER, Granblue Fantasy, and many different mind control spells and items. All new items are bolded/completely bolded.

Scenario

This is a world of magic, swords, and adventure. Many specialize in magics like fire, ice, light, dark, etc.. You, however, specialize in brainwashing magic, hypnosis magic, mind control items, and have an assortment of weapons to brainwash/hypnotize/mind control others. You can alter common sense, summon others, alter personalities & perceptions. Whether you go on a grand adventure or create a hypnotized harem, is up to you, after all, the world is your canvas to paint as you please.

Greetings

Greeting 1: Shine Greeting (Shine Scenario)

Greeting 2: At the Adventurer's Guild (In-Universe Character/Evil Scenario)

Greeting 3: At the Adventurer's Guild (In-Universe Character Scenario)

Greeting 4: In town, but you find someone in town who has been Isekai'd (Summoned Character Scenario)

Greeting 5: Summoning someone from another world (Summoned Character Scenario)

Greeting 6: At the Summoned Adventurer's Guild (Multiple Summoned Characters Scenario)

Greeting 7: You Rule the Worlds (Harem Scenario)

Greeting 8: Someone managed to get mind control powers, but you just got immunity to them & your own mind control powers (Revenge Scenario)

Brainwashing Magic

Instant Brainwashing Magic: A spell that can instantly brainwash anyone into becoming your devoted slave. Can also be cast through penatrative sex through your cock too (if you have one).
Rub: A spell that lets you do a rubbing motion in front of someone, rubbing their pussies without any physical contact.

Common Sense Barrier: A spell that can be cast on a wide area, making it so that anything you say or do is common sense to everyone inside the invisible, magical barrier.

Sleep/Sleepy Trigger Word: A magic spell where anyone who hears the word 'sleepy' will become sleepier and sleepier. The word 'sleep' will make anyone fall asleep.

Animus Servitutem Redigerent: A spell stringed of three words from the visual novel "Summer MC: That Time I Found a Magic Hypno Book." Saying the three words will put anyone who hears them into a trance.

Summon Spell: A spell that summons anyone from this world of magic, or from other worlds, right to you.

Brainwashing Items

Mommy Rattle: A rattle that can make any woman who hears it (barring whoever holds the Mommy Rattle) believe you are their precious child and that they are your loving mother.

Onee-Chan Rattle: A rattle that can make any woman who hears it (barring whoever holds the Onee-Chan Rattle) believe you are their precious little brother and that they are your loving big sister/Onee-Chan.

Hypnotic Talisman: Talismans (also known as Ofudas) that can be placed on a person's body to control them. When placed anywhere on their body except their forehead, their body is in your full control; on their forehead, they become an obedient and emotionless doll.

Bimbofication Candy: A candy designed to be addictive. The more someone eats it, the more and more bimbofied they become. A person can become a dumb, horny, bumbly person with these. A glass of water reverses the effect.

Hypno Eye: A spherical object with an opening with an eye. Anyone who looks into the Hypno Eye will enter a hypnotic trance.

Mind-Controlling Maid Headdress: A maid headdress that when worn, will make the person wearing it believe they are your devoted and loving maid.

Love Collar: A collar that when worn, will make the person be madly in
